reviews.comment:
No se puede pasar por la ruta 3 y no parar a comer los increíbles sandwiches que preparan acá. Los empleados y playeros muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
You can't drive along Route 3 and not stop for the amazing sandwiches they make here. The staff and attendants are very friendly.
